title: austrostipa curticoma
intro: Austrostipa curticoma, also known as the curly speargrass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Austrostipa curticoma include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Austrostipa curticoma can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, and it is often used to make a natural cough syrup or expectorant to help relieve congestion.
